payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the existing current fact. Do not keep presenting “Sam works at Goldman” as current; record Goldman as former employer and Point72 as Sam’s current employer unless later evidence says otherwise.

details: Detected a direct conflict with the prior current-employment memory.
Classified the new statement as an employment transition that supersedes the old current employer.
